sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n73296" key="o(losfu/rion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὁλοσφύρ-ιον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n73296.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">piece of beaten metal,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0708.tlg001:p.41" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ammon.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Diff.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.41</biblScope> </bibl> V.</sense> </entryFree>
